channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-7092] Interop 2.7.0<->master sanity test_133g 133f failed: mds1 find /proc/fs/lustre/ /proc/sys/lnet/ /proc/sys/lustre/ /sys/fs/lustre/ /sys/kernel/debug/lustre/ failed
item.description:
MDS console

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 133g: Check for Oopses on bad io area writes/reads in /proc == 12:10:42 (1441134642)
Lustre: 71929:0:(mdt_coordinator.c:1883:mdt_hsm_policy_seq_write()) lustre-MDT0000: '' is unknown, supported policies are:
LustreError: 71936:0:(mdt_coordinator.c:2035:mdt_hsm_cdt_control_seq_write()) lustre-MDT0000: Valid coordinator control commands are: enabled shutdown disabled purge help

Initializing cgroup subsys cpu
Linux version 2.6.32-504.30.3.el6_lustre.x86_64 (jenkins@onyx-6-sde1-el6-x8664.onyx.hpdd.intel.com) (gcc version 4.4.7 20120313 (Red Hat 4.4.7-11) (GCC) ) #1 SMP Mon Aug 17 16:53:02 PDT 2015

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 133g: Check for Oopses on bad io area writes/reads in /proc == 12:10:42 (1441134642)

mask usage: [+|-]<all|type> ...

Lustre: Unmounted lustre-client

Info required for matching: sanity 133f
Info required for matching: sanity 133g
item.environment:
server: lustre-master build #3142 RHEL6.6 DNE mode
client: 2.7.0
item.summary: Interop 2.7.0<->master sanity test_133g 133f failed: mds1 find /proc/fs/lustre/ /proc/sys/lnet/ /proc/sys/lustre/ /sys/fs/lustre/ /sys/kernel/debug/lustre/ failed

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/25363/
Subject: LU-7092 tests: generate sanity proc_dirs on facet
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 4b9de88f99066adf4365c6b747aad4f6d52d0ae2

Andreas Dilger (andreas.dilger@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/25363
Subject: LU-7092 tests: generate sanity proc_dirs on facet
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: e4ba3b06c96127ccf93ffb021ba206dabffa25f9
Unfortunately I don't have other logs, will try to reproduce it and get more information
Sarah, are the test logs available in Maloo for this failure? We need to see more of the MDS console logs with the actual stack trace. There may also be a crashdump for the MDS.
